---
name: Vendor crosswalk note
about: Add or correct a public vendor terminology mapping back to EMV 3DS semantics
title: "[Crosswalk] "
labels: ["vendor-crosswalk"]

---

## Vendor or product

Name the public gateway, PSP, SDK, or documentation set.

## Public terminology

List the vendor term, result code, or flow label.

## EMV 3DS mapping

Describe the closest protocol-level meaning.

## Supporting source

Link the exact public documentation that supports the mapping.

## Confidence

- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

## Notes

Include any ambiguity, version caveats, or places where the vendor abstraction hides protocol nuance.
